Day advanced to 2026-03-02.
7,959 new articles have been published since your last update and are available via the search_news tool. New date directories are also now present in articles/.
105 question(s) are still active. Re-read market.csv, scan today's news, and resubmit any forecast where new evidence has shifted your view before calling next_day again. A forecast is never "done" while its question is still active.
**IMPORTANT**: 6 question(s) resolve tomorrow (2026-03-03): ['157054', '16281', '803012', '68828', '937255', '768526']. Make sure your prediction on each is up-to-date before calling next_day — stale forecasts might hurt your performance.

## RESULTS SINCE YOUR LAST SESSION (2026-03-01 -> 2026-03-02)

- "What UAE emirate will be named as the site of a major oil facility where large plumes of smoke are seen after falling debris, by March 31, 2026?" → Fujairah

- "Which country will President Donald Trump threaten to cut off all trade with by 5 March 2026 for refusing US base access in the war with Iran?" → Spain
- "Which Iranian city will be identified by 3 March 2026 as the location of a hospital from which babies are evacuated after strike damage?" → Bushehr

## YOUR CUMULATIVE PERFORMANCE TILL TODAY
- Total Predictions: 107 (225 resolved, 105 active)
- accuracy: 3.0% | brier skill score: -0.039 | time weighted score: -967.93
  accuracy = fraction of ALL questions (resolved + active) where your top outcome matched the truth (0 credit for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); brier skill score = mean brier skill score across ALL questions (0 for questions you did not predict or that have not resolved); time weighted score = sum of brier skill scores across all resolved questions, across all days you held your respective predictions
